---
title: "The effect of gamma-irradiated recycled polyolefins as asphalt binder modifiers"
date: 2025-05-20
author:
  - name: Pinheiro, Gustavo
  - name: Dipold, Jessica
  - name: Freitas, Anderson Zanardi
  - name: Vasconcelos, Kamilla
  - name: Wetter, Niklaus
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Road Materials and Pavement Design"
  volume: 26
  doi: "10.1080/14680629.2025.2489028"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">The effect of gamma-irradiated recycled polyolefins as asphalt binder modifiers</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
